statement.title: Statement
statement.content:
Description CQXYM found a rectangle $ A $ of size $ n \times m $ . There are $ n $ rows and $ m $ columns of blocks. Each block of the rectangle is an obsidian block or empty. CQXYM can change an obsidian block to an empty block or an empty block to an obsidian block in one operation. A rectangle $ M $ size of $ a \times b $ is called a portal if and only if it satisfies the following conditions: - $ a \geq 5,b \geq 4 $ . - For all $ 1 < x < a $ , blocks $ M_{x,1} $ and $ M_{x,b} $ are obsidian blocks. - For all $ 1 < x < b $ , blocks $ M_{1,x} $ and $ M_{a,x} $ are obsidian blocks. - For all $ 1

1110

1001

1001

1001

0111

```
